name: booking_com_search
description: Search hotels/apartments on Booking.com. Args: <destination> [type=hotel|apartment|hostel|villa|resort|guesthouse|bnb] [checkin=YYYY-MM-DD] [checkout=YYYY-MM-DD] [adults=N] [children=N] [rooms=N] [price_min=N] [price_max=N] [stars=3,4,5] [currency=EUR] [facility=pool,spa,parking] [room=ac,balcony] [meal=breakfast] [free_cancel] [sort=price|review]. price_min/price_max are PER NIGHT. Pass them exactly as the user says. If user says total budget, divide by number of nights first. Example: Paris type=apartment checkin=2026-06-20 checkout=2026-06-26 adults=2 price_min=200 price_max=300
